name: Payment Failure and Mismatch Handling
primary_area: Payments / State / Manual Review / Expired Checkout / Idempotency
implementation_code_allowed: yes; payment outcome and mismatch handling only; no ticket issuance, attendee mutation, scanner/mobile sync, delivery, WhatsApp, provider refund, or direct Redis inventory mutation
existing_systems_forbidden_from_mutation: Scanner routes and scanner hot path
forbidden_changes: Paystack HTTP call inside Ash resource actions
Direct Repo status updates bypassing named Ash actions
Payment verified from webhook payload only
Direct Redis inventory key mutation outside ReservationLedger

Order: paid_verified -> manual_review only for explicit safety issue before fulfillment
expired -> manual_review for verified late payment without safe inventory recovery
expired -> paid_verified/fulfillment-ready only through approved late-payment recovery and state matrix
awaiting_payment -> manual_review for mismatch or suspicious provider result
CheckoutSession: expired -> manual_review for verified late payment without safe inventory recovery
expired -> paid or recovery state only if inventory recovery succeeds and matrix allows it
failed -> manual_review where provider/local state conflicts

duplicate_handling: RED duplicate webhook after verified_success creates harmful transitions
GREEN duplicate webhook is idempotent and records duplicate/no-op outcome
mismatch_handling: GREEN amount mismatch moves payment/order/event to manual_review with reason code
RED currency mismatch is silently normalized
GREEN currency mismatch moves to manual_review
RED reference mismatch updates wrong order
GREEN reference mismatch is unmatched/manual_review and no order is paid
provider_failure: RED failed/abandoned provider status issues tickets or marks paid_verified
GREEN failed/abandoned provider status marks failed/manual_review/pending according to matrix
RED transient timeout permanently fails immediately
GREEN timeout retries safely without erasing durable state
unmatched_events: GREEN unmatched event remains retained and retryable
RED unmatched event creates order from provider payload
GREEN unmatched event creates no value-delivery state
payment_after_expiry: RED verified late payment blindly issues ticket
GREEN no ticket issue occurs in VS-07C
RED late payment with unavailable inventory becomes fulfillment-ready
GREEN no-inventory case moves to manual_review
RED Redis unavailable during late recovery proceeds anyway
GREEN ledger-unhealthy case fails closed to manual_review
boundary_security: RED VS-07C creates TicketIssue/Attendee/DeliveryAttempt or enqueues issuance
RED logs contain raw payload, authorization_url, access_code, phone/email, token, or secret
GREEN logs contain only sanitized metadata

hot_data: payment duplicate locks/dedupe keys in Redis
late-payment inventory recovery through ReservationLedger only
warm_data: admin payment/order dashboard cache invalidated on outcome changes
cold_data: PaymentAttempt, PaymentEvent, Order, CheckoutSession, StateTransition in Postgres
redis_structures: ReservationLedger Redis structures for inventory only

ttl_strategy.active_processing_lock: about 60s; must not be correctness authority

pubsub_rules: never broadcast raw provider payloads or PII

next_slice: VS-08 — Ticket Code, QR, and Delivery Token Foundation
